headline: VP of Product, Clinical Workflows @ Ardent Health Systems | Practicing physician turned product leader
summary: Physician (MD) turned product leader with an MPH in health informatics. Leads clinical-workflow product at Ardent Health Systems across 30 hospitals; previously built a clinical decision support product team from scratch and shipped an FDA Class II SaMD-cleared tool.

experience.title: VP of Product, Clinical Workflows
experience.description: Owns product strategy for clinician-facing EHR workflow tools across 30 hospitals. Led launch of an AI-assisted clinical documentation tool now used by 1,200 physicians.

experience.title: Director of Product
experience.description: Built and led the clinical decision support product team (0 to 9 people). Shipped a Class II SaMD-cleared risk-scoring tool.

education.school: Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health

capabilities: Can advise on FDA Class II SaMD regulatory strategy for clinical decision support products
Can translate between clinicians and engineering teams
Can lead HIPAA/SOC2 compliance workstreams for health-tech products
relevance_summary: Sofia is a rare dual-credentialed contact: a practicing MD who is also a senior product leader, which makes her unusually good at bridging clinicians and engineers. She's the person to reach out to for regulatory strategy on clinical decision support (Class II SaMD), HIPAA/SOC2 compliance planning, or advisory roles at clinician-facing health-tech startups.
